sample_plan: 100% first lot, AQL after supplier lock
stop_rule: quarantine lot and block build if any supplier drawing, STEP, or sample identity is missing
notes: supplier drawing, STEP, sample, lot, and dimensional identity match the selected phone CAD baseline

stop_rule: stop line on screen lift, FPC overbend, touch-grid failure, or luminance outlier
notes: cover glass position, adhesive compression, FPC bend radius, luminance, and touch grid pass

sample_plan: 100% until routed PCB and connector supplier lock
stop_rule: stop build if connector seating, flex continuity, or battery clearance fails
notes: top and bottom PCB islands seat without battery window clash and split flex continuity passes

sample_plan: 100% EVT, then station SPC after fixture correlation
stop_rule: stop line on camera center shift, dust, acoustic leak, blocked mesh, or audio loopback failure
notes: rear/front camera alignment, dust seal, speaker/mic/earpiece leakage, and streaming/audio checks pass

stop_rule: stop build on high insertion force, post-cycle continuity failure, button force outlier, or damaged gasket
notes: USB-C insertion, button force/travel, haptic clearance, and port/button seal integrity pass

stop_rule: stop build on battery interference, cable pinch, failed retention, or out-of-limit gap/flush
notes: battery fits without cable pinch, orange enclosure closes, snap/screw retention and gap/flush pass

stop_rule: hold unit on function failure, CMF nonconformance, missing serial trace, or missing final photo
notes: full function, CMF, serial traceability, and final photo evidence pass before shipment
